name: 7 up Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the flour, lemon extract, and 7-Up®.
4. Pour the batter into a greased angel food or bundt pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until done.
6. Sprinkle with confectioner's sugar before serving.
